---
name: "Workspace Documentation Task"
description: "Use when: creating or revising plans, design docs, task lists, and user-facing workspace documentation."
argument-hint: "Artifact type + objective + audience + scope"
agent: "WorkspaceAgent"
---

Create or revise the workspace artifact below.

Documentation Inputs
- Artifact type: <design guide update|implementation plan|task list|user doc>
- Objective: <required>
- Target audience: <maintainer|contributors|players|mixed>
- Scope boundaries: <required>

Documentation Expectations
- Keep structure clear and easy to scan.
- Preserve terminology and contract consistency.
- Highlight decisions, assumptions, and next actions.

Required Output
1. Artifact summary
2. Key decisions and rationale
3. Open questions
4. Suggested follow-up actions
